data.body:
TARGETS — VERIFICATION CORRECTIONS (Explore audit). Verdict: complete & accurate except:
+ ADD dispatcher CHANGE targets: rebar:53 and rebar:64 (the _print_overview() help text also names --json for validate/next-batch). Targets only listed the per-subcommand usage lines.
+ CENTRALIZATION sourcing gaps: ticket-list.sh, ticket-bridge-status.sh, validate-issues.sh currently source NOTHING — each needs a `source "$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-output.sh"` line added. ticket-show.sh (sources ticket-lib.sh) + ticket-next-batch.sh (sources rebar-config.sh) already source a shared lib. DECISION: ticket-lib-api.sh should source ticket-output.sh itself (it's the in-process show/list home), and ticket-output.sh must be self-contained (no deps) so standalone scripts can source it directly.
+ No misclassifications; EXCLUDE list fully correct (all external git/acli/jira/gh). No hidden flag-parse sites — dispatcher delegates parsing to subcommands; the `ticket` symlink/script shares the same dispatcher.
